finding_results.notes: Rebuilt the identity chain before Hollis enters: compelled code legend (HR->Hollis Reddick), cross-checked badge 214 against after-hours manifests, and matched the same liaison field in pending authorization forms. Hollis's entrance now escalates pressure instead of supplying first proof.

Inserted concrete human consequence in both required argument blocks: explicit movement/staging of Isaiah's remains, fresh-homicide linkage, and direct family-level aftermath language alongside the legal strategy dispute.

Sharpened Hollis confrontation with room-level threat cues (door control, unsnapped holster, physical encroachment near seized copies) and added explicit legal constraint that they cannot detain him under this warrant without fresh probable cause.
Re-voiced Beau with higher contraction cadence and practical idiom under pressure while preserving legal substance, increasing idiolect separation from Lena in the warrant/hallway conflict beats.

summary: All pass-scoped HIGH/MEDIUM structural-craft findings were resolved in chapter_09 with causality tightened before the Hollis interruption, confrontation risk/legal constraint clarified, concrete consequence restored in both key argument blocks, and Beau's dialogue register differentiated from Lena's under pressure.
